title: Singapore negotiation: 50.6% negotiate, 80.2% achieve increase, higher salary history pressure
summary: Singapore negotiation rate is 50.6% (vs 52.5% regional). By level: Junior IC 47.5%, Mid-level IC 44.6%, Senior IC 62.2%, Leadership 50-60%. Outcomes: 80.2% achieve some increase (vs 79.5% regional), with 5-10% increases at 30.2% (vs 25.6%) and 11-20% at 18.6% (vs 19.5%). Negotiation confidence: 62.8% rate 4+ (vs 65.9% regional). Salary history disclosure required for 62.2% (vs 58.1% regional), with 85.9% reporting high pressure.
methodology: Self-reported negotiation behavior, outcomes, confidence, and salary history disclosure experience in anonymous online survey, filtered to Singapore
